tagline: I build AI that's smarter than me — and somehow, that's my job.
description: Senior AI Software Engineer in Dublin. Full-stack .NET, Angular, Azure, and AI for regulated industries.

roles.detailed: AI Engineer · Full-Stack Developer · .NET · Angular · Azure

bio: I'm a Senior AI Software Engineer, and I build full-stack, AI-powered software for industries where mistakes aren't an option. My path runs from Eurofins, the world's largest lab-testing network, to cloud delivery, and now to governance, risk and compliance at BoardX. Along the way I won a Best Paper Award for healthcare ML research, built EmotiBuddy, a real-time empathetic AI companion, and earned my MSc in Software Engineering at Maynooth with First Class Honours while working full-time. I don't really do things halfway.

bullets: Built an NLP-based command-line app in Java to process voice inputs — an early step into speech processing and AI.
Gained first hands-on exposure to Python and NLP through a government internships initiative.
experience.desc: An early internship under a government internships initiative, focused on web development and the first steps into NLP and speech processing.

bullets: Built a reusable UI component library (Angular, PrimeNG), boosting front-end productivity by 60%.
Implemented real-time collaborative editing with SignalR, driving 25% growth in client adoption across Europe.
Migrated legacy systems from SQL to Cosmos DB using Event Sourcing — cutting project costs by 35% and improving data integrity.
Automated lab device integrations (chromatography, balances, pH meters), reducing manual errors and increasing data accuracy.
Maintained 90%+ test coverage, established CI/CD pipelines, and championed Agile practices across teams.
experience.desc: Enterprise full-stack engineering for Eurofins' global laboratory-testing network — .NET Core/C# services and Angular frontends, backed by MS SQL and Azure Cosmos DB.

bullets: Engineered BDD test automation with Cucumber, Selenium WebDriver and Gherkin.
Designed and executed Java Spring test cases, safeguarding backend quality.
Automated web and mobile testing and integrated suites into CI/CD pipelines with scheduled regression runs, within Agile Scrum.
experience.desc: Quality-first test automation for client projects, delivered part-time while completing the MSc at Maynooth.

bullets: Designed and deployed cloud-native services on Azure, improving scalability and system reliability.
Built data pipelines for large datasets, enabling better monitoring, reporting and decision-making.
Applied machine learning models for anomaly detection, surfacing hidden issues and improving system performance.
Contributed to architecture and design discussions, ensuring solutions met security and compliance standards.
experience.desc: Cloud-native delivery and applied ML for client projects on Azure within an Agile consultancy team.

bullets: Designing and shipping AI-powered features for a governance, risk & compliance platform used by boards and leadership teams.
Owning features end-to-end in an early-stage startup — from data layer and AI services to frontend delivery.
Applying NLP and LLM techniques to compliance documents, risk insight and governance workflows.
experience.desc: Building AI capabilities inside a regulated GRC SaaS platform — end-to-end ownership from model integration to UI in a fast-moving startup.

projects.title: EmotiBuddy
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Empathetic AI Companion
projects.desc: A full-stack web app that sees, hears and responds with empathy: DeepFace for emotion detection, Whisper for speech-to-text, DistilBERT for sentiment, and GPT-2 for empathetic responses — all processed locally for privacy. Modular Flask/FastAPI backend, React frontend, designed around HCI principles.

projects.title: Command–Speech Recognition
projects.subtitle: Voice-Driven Command System
projects.desc: A user-friendly command recognition system built with Java, Sphinx4 and OpenNLP — it understands live speech and suggests the right command with its syntax. Voice interfaces, years before they were everywhere.

publications.title: Potent Analysis of Hypothyroidism — A Detailed Review
publications.desc: Best Paper Award–winning research predicting hypothyroidism using association rule mining, presented at the International Conference on Advances in Science, Engineering and Technology.

publications.title: Multitude Association Classification Model for Healthcare
publications.desc: Published research integrating association rule mining with machine learning to surface meaningful patterns and build predictive models for the healthcare domain.
